---
title: "test_personas_retheme_empire.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/empire_tests/test_personas_retheme_empire.py"
loc: 14
complexity: 2
logic_score: 7.07
style_score: 4.05
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 4.77
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating test_odin_retheme_docs_creates_dir.

## Interaction Protocol
Import test_odin_retheme_docs_creates_dir and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.1/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 7 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [src.core.personas](file://src.core.personas)
- [pytest](file://pytest)

### Exports
- `test_odin_retheme_docs_creates_dir`
